mapper.select: SELECT ai_data_id AS aiDataId, item_id AS itemId, process_id AS processId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, workplace_id AS workplaceId, worker_id AS workerId, prod_qty AS prodQty, defect_qty AS defectQty, defect_rate AS defectRate, temperature AS temperature, humidity AS humidity, equipment_runtime AS equipmentRuntime, work_shift AS workShift, risk_level AS riskLevel, result_yn AS resultYn, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM ai_quality_data ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT total_count AS totalCount, high_count AS highCount, avg_defect_rate AS avgDefectRate, top_risk_equipment_id AS topRiskEquipmentId, top_risk_equipment_rate AS topRiskEquipmentRate FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_quality_data) AS total_count,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_quality_data WHERE risk_level = 'HIGH') AS high_count,
(SELECT ROUND(NVL(AVG(defect_rate), 0), 2) FROM ai_quality_data) AS avg_defect_rate,
(SELECT equipment_id FROM ( SELECT equipment_id, ROUND(AVG(defect_rate), 2) AS avg_rate FROM ai_quality_data GROUP BY equipment_id ORDER BY avg_rate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS top_risk_equipment_id,
(SELECT avg_rate FROM ( SELECT equipment_id, ROUND(AVG(defect_rate), 2) AS avg_rate FROM ai_quality_data GROUP BY equipment_id ORDER BY avg_rate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS top_risk_equipment_rate FROM dual )
SELECT risk_level AS riskLevel, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ai_quality_data GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY risk_level

SELECT a.highRiskRate AS highRiskRate, a.dayAvgDefectRate AS dayAvgDefectRate, a.nightAvgDefectRate AS nightAvgDefectRate, b.topRiskEquipmentId AS topRiskEquipmentId, b.topRiskEquipmentRate AS topRiskEquipmentRate, a.highTempRiskRate AS highTempRiskRate FROM ( SELECT ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN risk_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100 , 2) AS highRiskRate,
ROUND( AVG(CASE WHEN work_shift = 'DAY' THEN defect_rate END) , 2) AS dayAvgDefectRate,
ROUND( AVG(CASE WHEN work_shift = 'NIGHT' THEN defect_rate END) , 2) AS nightAvgDefectRate,
ROUND( AVG(CASE WHEN temperature >= 30 THEN defect_rate END) , 2) AS highTempRiskRate FROM ai_quality_data ) a, ( SELECT equipment_id AS topRiskEquipmentId, avg_rate AS topRiskEquipmentRate FROM ( SELECT equipment_id, ROUND(AVG(defect_rate), 2) AS avg_rate FROM ai_quality_data GROUP BY equipment_id ORDER BY avg_rate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) b
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_predict_history ( predict_id, prod_qty, temperature, humidity, equipment_runtime, work_shift_num, risk_level, created_at ) VALUES ( 'AIP' || seq_ai_predict_history.NEXTVAL, #{prodQty}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{equipmentRuntime}, #{workShiftNum}, #{riskLevel}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT predict_id AS predictId, prod_qty AS prodQty, temperature AS temperature, humidity AS humidity, equipment_runtime AS equipmentRuntime, work_shift_num AS workShiftNum, risk_level AS riskLevel, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM ( SELECT * FROM ai_predict_history ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
